interpretation: Good - harvest possible with minor caution
advice: It's almost time to harvest your wheat, but wait a few more days until the humidity drops a bit. This week, watch out for rainy days, as the current high humidity can bring fungal disease to your wheat - check the skies daily and be ready to harvest quickly if it starts to rain. To store your wheat properly, make sure it's completely dry and keep it in a well-ventilated, dry area to prevent mold and spoilage. Harvest your wheat when the weather is dry and sunny, and consider doing it in the morning when the dew has dried up.
